creator: jeff+freebsd@wagsky.com
text:
Noticed when trying to install net/wireshark on 13.2-RELEASE-p9 (amd64) where it is apparently not available on either the Quarterly or Latest repos.

Trying to build locally with poudriere failed.

Possibly related to #274743 and #274471

Failure appears to be related to build-depends

Failed to install the following 1 package(s): /packages/All/py39-sphinx-markdown-tables-0.0.15,1.pkg

log excerpt:

